ddls:
CREATE TABLE "economic_indicators" (
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each economic indicator */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the economic indicator (e.g., labor force, employment) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the economic indicator */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measurement for the economic indicator */,
  "category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the category to which the economic indicator belongs */,
  "source_type" TEXT /* Type of data source (e.g., government, financial institution) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the indicator data was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_economic_indicators_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("category_id") REFERENCES categories ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" TEXT /* Year for which data is collected */,
  "quarter" INTEGER /* Quarter of the year */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "weeks" (
  "week_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each week */,
  "week_name" TEXT /* Week for which data is collected */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the week */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the week */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("week_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data updates */,
  "contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the contact person at the data source */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Email of the contact person at the data source */,
  "data_format" TEXT /* Format of the data provided (e.g., CSV, JSON) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data point */,
  "indicator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the economic indicator */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "week_id" INTEGER /* ID of the week */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data source */,
  "value" REAL /* Value of the data point */,
  "data_quality" TEXT /* Quality of the data (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the data was recorded */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the data point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_week_id FOREIGN KEY ("week_id") REFERENCES weeks ("week_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_indicator_id FOREIGN KEY ("indicator_id") REFERENCES economic_indicators ("indicator_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poverty_thresholds" (
  "threshold_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poverty threshold */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "value" REAL /* Poverty threshold value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("threshold_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poverty_thresholds_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "snap_beneficiaries" (
  "beneficiary_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each SNAP beneficiary */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "value" REAL /* Number of SNAP beneficiaries */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("beneficiary_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_snap_beneficiaries_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "median_house_prices" (
  "price_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each median house price */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* ID of the year */,
  "value" REAL /* Median house price value */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("price_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_median_house_prices_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user account (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data being accessed */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user accessing the data */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the device used to access the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "categories" (
  "category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each category */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_revisions" (
  "revision_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each revision */,
  "data_id" INTEGER /* ID of the data point being revised */,
  "old_value" REAL /* Old value of the data point */,
  "new_value" REAL /* New value of the data point */,
  "revision_date" TEXT /* Date of the revision */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the revision */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("revision_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_revisions_data_id FOREIGN KEY ("data_id") REFERENCES data ("data_id")
)
